title: In RealTime
description:
!! IMPORTANT !!

I am no longer supporting this mod!! Use Time Control instead.

https://modrinth.com/mod/time-control/versions



Syncs real-world time with in-game time.
body:
# **!! IMPORTANT !!
# 
# I am no longer supporting this mod!! Use Time Control instead.
# 
# https://modrinth.com/mod/time-control/versions
# **



A (not so) simple Fabric mod that syncs real-world time with in-game time. It uses the system(OS) Minecraft is running on to load the time.

To disable syncing the time simply remove the mod. I'm am NOT planning on adding configs. I also highly recommend pairing this mod with some sort of HUD clock.


This mod works both client side (singleplayer) and server side. For example,
- You can use it in a Singleplayer world.
- You can join a server running the mod with a vanilla client.
- You can join a server running the mod with a modded client running the mod.
- You CANNOT join a vanilla server with a modded client running the mod.

(You must have it installed on the server if you wish to play on a server with it.)

!!!!   MAKE SURE YOU LEAVE THE DAYLIGHT CYCLE ON! THE MOD REQUIRES IT TO ADVANCE TIME   !!!!

If you have any issues please join the Discord server and navigate to the #mod-discussion chat. Try to keep questions for help out of the general chat.

HUGE thanks and credit to these amazing people for helping me with this mod:
- Code Hammering Specialist
- Project Unfinisher
- Koshka
